hero.title: Start your store. Grow your brand.
hero.subtitle: Launch in minutes with secure payments, guided setup, and everything you need to sell online.

placeholders.businessEmailOrPhone: Enter your business email or phone

password.helper: Use 8+ characters with upper/lowercase letters, numbers, and symbols.

actions.alreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Log in

validation.invalidEmailPhone: Enter a valid email or phone number.
validation.passwordWeak: Your password is too weak. Make it stronger to continue.

errors.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please try again in a few minutes.
errors.accountExists: An account already exists with this email/phone. Log in instead.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

success.login: Welcome back! Redirecting to your dashboard...
success.register: Account created successfully. Verify your code to continue.

validation.invalid: That code is incorrect. Try again.
validation.expired: This code has expired. Request a new one.

success.verified: Verified successfully. Let’s set up your store.

common.saveFailed: Couldn’t save your changes. Please try again.
common.networkIssue: Connection issue detected. Check your internet and retry.

storeName.title: Name your store
storeName.subtitle: Choose a name your customers will remember.

validation.short: Store name must be at least 3 characters.
validation.invalidChars: Use letters, numbers, spaces, or hyphens only.
validation.slugTaken: This store URL is already taken. Try another name.

logo.title: Add your logo
logo.subtitle: Upload your brand logo to personalize your storefront.
logo.dropzone: Drag & drop your logo here, or click to upload
logo.helper: PNG, JPG, or SVG up to 2MB

validation.unsupported: Unsupported file type. Please upload PNG, JPG, or SVG.
validation.tooLarge: File is too large. Maximum size is 2MB.

firstProduct.title: Add your first product
firstProduct.subtitle: Create one product now. You can add more anytime.

validation.priceInvalid: Enter a valid price greater than 0.

payment.title: Set up payments
payment.subtitle: Connect a payment method so you can accept customer orders.
payment.trust: Your payment data is encrypted and securely stored.

validation.missingDetails: Please complete all required payment details.
validation.providerError: Couldn’t connect payment provider. Please retry.

publish.title: Publish your store
publish.subtitle: Your store is ready. Go live and start selling.

success.title: Your store is live 🎉
success.message: Congratulations! Your store is now published and ready for customers.

error.failed: Publish failed. Please try again in a moment.

empty.products: No products yet. Add your first product to start selling.
empty.payments: No payment method connected yet. Connect one to accept orders.
